General.Name: DEFAMA Deutsche Fachmarkt AG
General.Description: DEFAMA Deutsche Fachmarkt AG, together with its subsidiaries, engages in real estate business in Germany. It acquires, manages, and leases retail parks and shopping centers, as well as small retail and commercial properties. The company was incorporated in 2014 and is headquartered in Berlin, Germany.
